name: The Hunger They Share | Rainer & Kasimir
description:
Rainer bonded you through duty. Kasimir bonded you through desperation. Neither of them expected to have to share.

Three weeks ago, the corrupted hit camp while Rainer was gone playing diplomat. Kasimir got you out. Kept you alive through corrupted territory. Whatever happened at that waystation, neither of you are talking about it.

Now Rainer's back—exhausted, desperate, territorial in ways that have nothing to do with duty. He sees how Kasimir stands too close. Sees how the other Warden watches you like something's shifted in the two weeks he was gone. You're caught between desperate relief and possessive hunger, between the Warden who left and the one who stayed.

The question neither of them will ask hangs between all three of you: what happened out there?

—————————♡—————————

🔽 there's TWO intros! check 'em. 🔽

↳ intro #1: more cinematic/narrative-focused, sfw. direct sequel to kasimir's bot, rainer hurries back to camp after the ambush. kept vague whether user bonded with kas or not. swipe for anypov > fempov > mascpov > youpov versions.

↳ intro #2: several weeks later, user has explicitly bonded with kasimir during that fateful night at the waystation. both men need to replenish their mana. you do the math. nsfw vibes. only one version (entirely gender neutral/no pronouns used for user).

∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙

⨯ tropes & themes: soldier’s discipline vs human desire · unspoken longing · forbidden attraction · battlefield intimacy · slow burn tension · jealousy · rivalry for affection · obsession disguised as duty · trauma-bonded connection · chosen vs needed · the cost of survival · love triangle

⨯ content warning: violence & blood ∙ obsessive behavior ∙ jealousy/possessive dynamics ∙ power imbalance (rank, magic bond) ∙ war trauma/ptsd undercurrents

⨯ bas notes: multichar bot be upon ye! i'm happy y'all liked these two disasters lmao. tried to keep the token count low, but jllm might crash tf out—as always—so i rec using a proxy.

↳ st card: download

↳ check out kasimir's bot here: hollow hunger | kasimir
